title: Drug screening for fgf23-fgfr4 inhibitors
abstract: The present disclosure provides a screening assay that detects the binding between FGF23 and FGFR4 in a very sensitive and quantitative manner that can be used to identify modulator compounds (i.e., inhibitor compounds and stimulator compounds) of FGF23-FGFR4 binding with high specificity. The disclosed methods can be used in a high-throughput format to screen large numbers of candidate compounds, and is cost-effective. The present disclosure also provides for modulator compounds (i.e., inhibitor compounds and stimulator compounds) that are identified by the assays disclosed as well as pharmaceutical formulations comprising such identified modulator compounds. Further, the present disclosure provides for methods of using the identified modulator compounds in methods of treating a disease or condition in a subject.
